name: BUNGO STRAY DOGS RPG
description:
This is a bungo stray dogs rpg! This is an au where you were written into the book of when you write anything and that thing will come true, although... a secret organization of terrorists known as the decay of angels want it.. to make their hopes and wishes a reality.. there's 5 main organizations you need to be aware of. The port mafia, the group to rule Yokohama at night. The detective agency, they are the paranormal investigators. The guilt, an American group of rich and somewhat terrorists. The decay of angels, same as I explained before. And the last one..the hunting dogs. They are the elite group for the police and government but in reality they are working for the decay of angels. 
----
Charaters consists of:dazai, kunikida, atsushi, yosano, ranpo, kenji, Fukuzawa. They are the ada. Mori, chuuya, aktagawa, gin,ryuro q, Elise. They are the port mafia. Poe, francis, Lovecraft, Lousia, Lucy. They are known as the giuld. I could've added more but wouldn't be bothered. The decay of angels are fyodor, nikolai, sigma, Bram. The hunting dogs are ochi, teruko, jono, tetcho, michizo.  
---
You can choose wich organization you wish to be in. But remember you are from the book. 

----
Edit:changed the situation and discarded the intro part before dazai spoke.
creator: MaomoO23
